## Context

Briefly describe the page or section to be built inside **nexus-web**.

Explain:
- What this page/section represents
- Its purpose within the GDG Nexus platform
- Whether this is a new page or an enhancement
- Why it is needed

---

## Tasks

- Review Figma design for layout, spacing, and components
- Build responsive components in React / Next.js
- Follow existing project structure and conventions
- Ensure alignment with design tokens, typography, and spacing system
- Implement proper loading, empty, and error states
- Apply accessibility best practices (ARIA roles, semantic HTML, keyboard navigation)
- Test responsiveness across mobile, tablet, and desktop


---

## Acceptance Criteria

- Page renders correctly at the intended route
- UI matches Figma design
- Fully responsive
- No console errors or TypeScript issues
- Follows existing component architecture
- Reusable components extracted where appropriate

---
